frontend.phase_1: Descriptive analysis of workbench-ui: grid-based GodViewLayout, modular React components, partial container/presentational separation, React context for state, Tailwind CSS, SSE-driven telemetry, RemedialManifold for remediation, CommandPalette and ESC for accessibility, experimental chaos components present.

phase_2.chaos_mode: Not fully isolated from main tree.
phase_2.hydration_race: MonitorContainer connects SSE before baseline loaded.

middleware.phase_1: FastAPI gateway, Redis pub/sub for telemetry, Pydantic validation, async subprocess for scanner, patch generation, session events API, CORS, path validation, SSRF prevention, strict data contracts, error boundaries.

phase_2.patch_pipeline: Check endpoint and payload match frontend.
phase_2.scanner: Confirm output path and error handling.
phase_2.contract_versioning: Ensure models are versioned and in sync.

backend.phase_1: Read-only observer, YAML-driven governance, iterative file traversal, AST profiling, AI orchestrator, entropy and forbidden pattern detection, produces JSON/Markdown reports, invoked by middleware.

phase_2.governance_schema: Ensure all rules required by frontend/middleware.
phase_2.output_consistency: scan_results.json and scan_summary.md must be in sync.
phase_2.test_coverage: Expand for new rules and edge cases.
phase_2.integration_hooks: CLI/subprocess must return correct exit codes.
phase_2.error_handling: All exceptions must be logged and surfaced.
phase_2.performance: Monitor for regressions on large repos.
